text: 57.9g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.

pros first: shockingly dense on paper because unsweetened cocoa is one of the rare misc items that actually brings real numbers too. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. use case can matter more than macros because this category is really about function and trade-offs.

now the downsides: normal serving sizes are much smaller than 100 grams because that trims how much of the paper score you really realise. easy to oversell beyond what the numbers support because misc items often attract exaggerated narratives. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.
A tier. Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
